description.ko: ECHO-0는 음향 주파수를 역동적인 실시간 시각적 구조로 변환하여 소리와 시각 사이의 간극을 좁히는 최첨단 디지털 설치 예술 프로젝트입니다.
description.en: ECHO-0 is a cutting-edge digital installation that translates acoustic frequencies into dynamic, real-time visual architectures, bridging the gap between sound and sight.

prompt: Cinematic 3D render of abstract sound waves, holographic frequency spectrum patterns morphing in a deep obsidian void, iridescent neon cyan and magenta pulses, mathematical geometric structures vibrating to rhythmic pulses, high fidelity, 8k resolution, ray-traced lighting.
